description: Style NoteCrafted from the brand's best materials, this bag from quiksilver is a sure fire way of charming yourself into the fashion crowd. With bold prints and sharp silhouetting, this bag grabs attention (in the right way) and hits the style notes just right. Help yourself to this delicious indulgence, we assure you won't regret it!Product DetailsMulti coloured upper with two main zipped compartmentsHas a zipped compartment in the front with organizer slotsHas a haul loop and two adjustable, padded shoulder strapsThe print may vary slightly from product to productMaterial and Care100% polyesterWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 39 cmWidth: 37 cmDepth: 12 cm
